components.name: action-sheet-item
components.description: A single row item for action sheets. Supports icon slots on both sides, an optional description label, and seven semantic states (Default, Hover, Active, Emphased, Disabled, Destructive, Creation) across three sizes.

components.name: action-sheet-menu
components.description: A contextual menu panel composed of grouped ActionSheet_Item rows, optional section titles, and separator lines. Supports three layout types: Default (icon + label + secondary icon), Checkbox (checkbox row layout), and Flat (icon + label + secondary icon, no section headers).

reuses.notes: Repeated for each list item row in default and flat types.
Used in checkbox type — each row wraps a Checkbox instance.

components.name: badges
components.description: Status indicator pill with optional leading/trailing icons. Supports 9 semantic types (Primary, Secondary, Tertiary, Success, Info, Warning, Danger, onEmphasis, Outlined), 3 sizes (Small, Medium, Large) and 2 styles (Bordered, Light). Outlined and onEmphasis only exist in Light style.

size.description: Size variant — controls padding and gap

badgeStyle.description: Style variant — bordered adds a colored stroke, light removes it

components.name: brand-provider
components.description: Applies a chosen brand to document.documentElement so CSS alias tokens switch. No visual layers.

components.name: breadcrumbs
components.description: Horizontal breadcrumb trail showing navigation hierarchy. A single axis (Steps) controls how many ancestor steps are shown before the current (active) step. The first step always shows a home icon. Intermediate steps use fg/muted with a chevron-right separator. The last (current) step uses fg/default with a chevron-down dropdown affordance.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps from root to current

showDropdownAffordance.description: Whether the current (last) step shows a chevron-down dropdown affordance

stepsVariant.description: Override the steps variant key (derived from steps.length - 1 if omitted)

components.name: button
components.description: Interactive button component with 5 type variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, destructive, validation), 4 sizes (sm, md, lg, icon), and 4 interaction states (rest, hover, clicked, disable). Supports optional left/right icon slots.

variant.description: Visual style variant (maps to spec variantAxes.type)

asChild.description: Render child element in place of <button> (e.g. <a>)

leftIcon.description: Optional icon rendered before the label

rightIcon.description: Optional icon rendered after the label

components.name: checkbox
components.description: A toggle control that supports unchecked (Rest), hover, checked (Clicked), indeterminate (Mixed), and disabled states. Single variant axis: State.

className.description: Additional class names for the root element

components.name: collapsible
components.description: Expandable disclosure panel with a header (icon + title + chevron toggle button) and a collapsible content area. Single variant axis: open/close state.

icon.description: Leading icon in the header. Defaults to ShoppingCart as placeholder.

children.description: Content rendered inside the collapsible area

className.description: Additional className on the root element

reuses.notes: toggle-button renders as <Button variant="tertiary" size="icon"> wrapping a ChevronDown icon.

gaps.reason: Button is imported and used for the toggle. ChevronDown is passed as children (icon-only slot). A rotation class is appended via className to animate the chevron on open — this is a one-off visual tweak, not a rebuild.

components.name: data-table
components.description: Generic data-driven table built on @tanstack/react-table. Accepts columns[] + data and renders sort + pagination + custom cells. Uses <Table> primitives internally.

pagination.description: Enables pagination when given an object. Default false.

toolbar.description: Toolbar slot rendered above the table.

emptyState.description: Content when data is empty. Default "No data."

className.description: Passed to the outer container div.

components.name: floating-alert
components.description: A floating alert banner with a state-colored icon highlight, body text, and a dismiss button. Four severity states (Danger, Warning, Information, Success) in three sizes (Small, Medium, Large).

children.description: Alert title / content — the primary message.

components.name: header-desktop
components.description: Desktop page header with a title, breadcrumb trail, and contextual action row. Two feature variants: Default (icon-only tertiary action buttons + a primary secondary button) and Search active (title + a small search input replacing the action row).

title.description: Page title rendered as <h1> in the title row.

features.description: Mode selector: default renders the actions row; search-active replaces it with a search input.

actions.description: Action buttons rendered left-to-right in the title row when features='default'. Ignored in search-active.

breadcrumbs.description: Breadcrumb steps forwarded to <BreadCrumbs>. Omit or pass false to hide the row.

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder for the search input. Only used when features='search-active'.

onSearchChange.description: Called on every search input change. Only used when features='search-active'.

className.description: Additional className applied to the root <header> element.

reuses.notes: Breadcrumb trail rendered via <BreadCrumbs> with showDropdownAffordance.
action-button-tertiary renders as <Button variant="tertiary" size="icon">; action-button-secondary renders as <Button variant="secondary" size="md">.
search-input renders as <Input size="small" state="default"> in the search-active variant.

components.name: header-phone
components.description: Mobile phone header bar with a top row (hamburger menu button, brand logo, notification button with dot indicator) and a second row (page title + search button), followed by a breadcrumb trail. Single variant — no variant axes.

title.description: Page title rendered in the title bar

hasNotification.description: Whether to show the notification dot on the bell button

notificationCount.description: Unread count label for the notification button (for screen readers)

breadcrumbs.description: Breadcrumb steps forwarded to <BreadCrumbs>. Omit or pass false to hide the row entirely.

showSearch.description: Show the search button in the title bar. Defaults to true.

logo.description: Logo slot — accepts any React node (brand asset, img, svg component, etc.)

onSearchClick.description: Handler for search button click. Only invoked when showSearch is true.

reuses.notes: menu-button, notification-btn, and search-button each render as <Button variant="tertiary" size="icon">.

gaps.reason: No 'brand-logo' component in klp-components.json. The Klub! brand logo is a custom SVG asset, not a lucide icon. Inlined as a slot prop accepting any ReactNode, with a text fallback 'K!'.

components.name: in-content-alert
components.description: Inline alert banner with a semantic content type (Info, Success, Danger, Warning) and three sizes. Displays a title with matching icon and an optional body text below.

components.name: input
components.description: Text input field with label, optional icons (search/action), and helper text. Supports three sizes (large, medium, small) and six states (default, filled, focused, success, danger, disable).

label.description: Label text displayed above the input

description.description: Helper / description text displayed below the input

showInfoIcon.description: Show the optional info icon next to the label

iconLeft.description: Icon rendered on the left inside the input box

iconRight.description: Icon rendered on the right inside the input box

state.description: Explicit visual state override. When omitted the component derives state from native HTML attributes (disabled, aria-invalid) and focus/value events.

className.description: Additional className applied to the outer root wrapper

inputBoxClassName.description: Additional className applied to the input-box container

components.name: item-side-bar
components.description: A sidebar navigation item with an icon, label, and optional collapsible content panel. Two feature axes: Collapsible (shows chevron affordance and expands an ActionSheet content area) and Static (no chevron, no content panel). Three states: Rest, Hover, Active.

state.description: Interaction state — drives trigger fill and icon-container border. Represents the currently-selected navigation item.

feature.description: Feature mode — collapsible adds chevron + expandable content panel

icon.description: Icon to render inside the decorative icon box. Defaults to FolderOpen.

children.description: Content rows rendered inside the expanded panel.

open.description: Whether the collapsible panel is open (controlled)

reuses.notes: Content panel renders ActionSheetItem rows as children.

gaps.reason: No 'decorative-icon' component in klp-components.json. Inlined as a 20x20 span wrapper with px-klp-size-4xs / py-klp-size-4xs padding.
No standalone 'icon' component in klp-components.json. Rendered directly via lucide-react FolderOpen.
No standalone 'icon' component in klp-components.json. Chevron rendered via lucide-react ChevronRight / ChevronDown.

components.name: list
components.description: A vertical list container with header, optional action button, and repeated List_content rows. Supports Condensed (tight spacing), Default (medium spacing), and withInputs (with filter inputs in the header) layout styles.

listTitle.description: Title text rendered in the header

showButton.description: Whether to show the header action button (hidden in with-inputs)

buttonLabel.description: Label text for the header action button

onButtonClick.description: Click handler for the header action button

itemSize.description: Size passed down to each ListContent row

items.description: Rows — each entry maps to a <ListContent> instance

headerInputs.description: Slot for filter inputs shown in the header when style="with-inputs".

reuses.notes: header-button renders as <Button variant="tertiary" size="md"> (condensed and default styles only).
Each row in the items section is a ListContent instance.

gaps.reason: header-title color is a literal #2b2b2b; no --klp-fg-* alias in any brand variant maps to this value. Closest alias (--klp-fg-default) resolves to --klp-color-gray-800 (wireframe), a different value.
gaps.action: arbitrary-value-tailwind — text-[#2b2b2b] applied via cva class string

components.name: list-content
components.description: A list row with a decorative icon on the left, label + sublabel text block, and an optional tertiary icon-button action on the right. Three sizes (Small, Medium, Large) and three interaction states (Default, Hover, Active).

size.description: Size variant — controls padding and sublabel font-size

state.description: Interaction state — controls background fill and text/icon color. Represents the selected row in the list.

showDecorativeIcon.description: Whether to show the left decorative icon

decorativeIcon.description: Custom decorative icon — defaults to Plus from lucide-react

showActionButton.description: Whether to show the right action button

onActionClick.description: Callback for the action button click

asChild.description: Use Slot (asChild) pattern on the root

components.name: pagination
components.description: Standalone page navigator with ellipsis algorithm. Reusable outside tables.

pageSize.description: Items per page (used for the "X-Y of Z" label).

total.description: Total number of items across all pages.

onPageChange.description: Called with the new 1-indexed page number.

siblingCount.description: Number of pages shown on each side of the current page. Default 1.

showLabel.description: Toggle the "X-Y of Z" label on the left. Default true.

components.name: radio
components.description: Radio button control with four interaction states: rest (unchecked default), hover (unchecked hovered), clicked (checked/selected), and disable. No size axis — single size only.

className.description: Additional class names for the root element

components.name: sidebar
components.description: Vertical navigation sidebar with a branded header (logo + notification button), a location/context switcher, a scrollable menu of item-side-bar instances, and a user profile footer. Two device variants: Desktop (247px wide, 640px tall) and Phone (320px wide, 568px tall — wider with a close/dismiss button replacing the notification affordance).

logo.description: Logo node rendered in the header

onNotificationClick.description: Called when notification/close button is clicked

activeKey.description: Key of the currently active top-level menu entry. Drives row highlight and auto-expansion of the matching collapsible panel.

activeChildKey.description: Key of the currently active sub-item. Only honored when its parent matches `activeKey`.

onNavigate.description: Called when a leaf row is clicked. `parentKey` is set for sub-rows. Parents with children do not fire this — they toggle their panel.

avatar.description: Avatar image node or src string

reuses.notes: notification-button renders as <Button variant="tertiary" size="icon"> with Bell (desktop) or X (phone) icon.
Each menu item renders as <ItemSideBar feature=... state=...>.

gaps.reason: No 'brand-logo' component in klp-components.json. The Klub! brand logo is a custom SVG asset. Inlined as a slot prop (logo?: ReactNode) with a text fallback 'KLUB'.
No DS Avatar component registered. Rendered as a 40x40 rounded-full div accepting a ReactNode or img src string.

components.name: switch
components.description: Toggle switch with two states: on (checked) and off (unchecked). Uses animated thumb with icon indicator. Backed by Radix Switch primitive for full a11y and keyboard support.

className.description: Additional class names for the root element

components.name: table
components.description: Compound HTML primitives (Table.Root/Header/Body/Row/Head/Cell/Caption) with klp styling. Low-level building blocks for custom tables.

components.name: tabulation-cells
components.description: A single tab cell used within a tabulation bar. Renders a label and an optional badge count. State=Rest shows a neutral transparent background; State=Active shows the selected tab with brand-low fill, bold label, and brand-accented badge.

children.description: Label text rendered inside the tab cell (passed as children).

badge.description: Badge count to display alongside the label. Omit to hide the badge.

components.name: tabulations
components.description: Horizontal tab bar container that wraps Tabulation_Cells instances separated by vertical line dividers. Scroll type=None (fixed layout). Delegates cell selection state (active/rest) to the tabulation-cells sub-component via a MutationObserver bridge. Backed by @radix-ui/react-tabs for full a11y keyboard navigation.

tabs.type: Array<{ value: string; label: React.ReactNode; badge?: TabulationCellProps['badge'] }>
tabs.description: Each tab item. Provide value (unique id), label (display text), and optional badge count.

components.name: text-area
components.description: Multi-line text input with optional rich-text formatting toolbar. Two feature variants: Simple (plain textarea) and Rich text (with formatting toolbar and action bar). Supports Default, Focus, Filled, Danger, Success, and Disable states.

feature.description: Feature variant: plain textarea or rich-text with toolbar + action bar

state.description: Explicit visual state override. When omitted, state is derived from native attributes (disabled, aria-invalid) and from focus/value events (hasValue, isFocused).

showHeader.description: Show the header row (label + optional info icon). Matches Figma Show header prop.

showInfoIcon.description: Show the info icon next to the label. Matches Figma Show info icon prop.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown inside the input area

id.description: Accessible id linking label to textarea

toolbarActions.description: Rich-text toolbar actions (feature=rich-text only). Each action renders as a tertiary icon Button with its icon + aria-label.

className.description: Extra className forwarded to the root wrapper

resize.description: Resize handle behavior on the textarea

components.name: tooltip
components.description: Contextual tooltip bubble with a directional arrow. Variant axis controls arrow placement (bottom-left, bottom-right, top-left, top-right). Backed by @radix-ui/react-tooltip for a11y and keyboard support.

children.description: The element that triggers the tooltip.

arrowOrientation.description: Controls arrow placement and tooltip position.
